references.name: NHS App web integration overview
references.borrowed: Treat embedded routes as webview-hosted content that hides duplicate site chrome and uses NHS App specific functionality.
references.rejected: Did not treat query hints or user agent alone as trust or actionability.

references.name: NHS App JS API v2
references.borrowed: Calendar action payload follows the storage addEventToCalendar shape and remains behind a wrapper.
references.rejected: Did not scatter direct JS API calls through offer, waitlist, or manage cards.

references.name: NHS App appointments
references.borrowed: Appointments can be viewed, cancelled, and added to device calendar, subject to system support.
references.rejected: Did not imply every appointment is cancellable or calendar-enabled.

references.name: NHS service manual content accessibility
references.borrowed: Clear labels, explicit error and recovery language, and visible relationships between controls and descriptions.
references.rejected: Did not add long explanatory copy to every state.

references.name: NHS service manual error message component
references.borrowed: Error and recovery language is connected to the relevant action surface.
references.rejected: Did not use detached generic browser error pages.

references.name: WAI-ARIA APG landmarks
references.borrowed: One main landmark and labelled route regions.
references.rejected: Did not add excess landmarks for every small card.

references.name: Playwright ARIA snapshots
references.borrowed: ARIA snapshots are captured for offer list, manage workspace, and sticky action reserve.
references.rejected: Did not rely only on pixel screenshots for accessibility proof.

references.name: Linear UI redesign
references.borrowed: Reduce visual noise while increasing hierarchy and density.
references.rejected: Did not compress booking into a spreadsheet-like slot grid.

references.name: Vercel nested layouts
references.borrowed: Persistent section chrome and continuity across child routes.
references.rejected: Did not duplicate a new shell for each booking child state.

references.name: Carbon data table style
references.borrowed: Compact text scale and dense-but-readable metadata rows.
references.rejected: Did not use a dense table as the primary mobile availability view.

references.name: RFC 5545 iCalendar
references.borrowed: Calendar event payload needs stable subject, location, start, end, and identity semantics.
references.rejected: Did not invent provider-specific add-calendar URLs inside leaf UI.
